<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# SPACE changed the board. Let me see what changed
before = {n['id']: n['pixels'] for n in previous_frame.segmentation['nodes']}
after = {n['id']: n['pixels'] for n in current_frame.segmentation['nodes']}
for pid in before:
    if pid in after:
        if before[pid] != after[pid]:
            print("Changed:", pid, before[pid], "->", after[pid])
# Check color changes too
before_colors = {n['id']: n['color'] for n in previous_frame.segmentation['nodes']}
after_colors = {n['id']: n['color'] for n in current_frame.segmentation['nodes']}
for pid in before_colors = {n['id']: n['color'] for n in previous_frame.segmentation['nodes']}
after_colors = {n['id']: n['color'] for n in current_frame.segmentation['nodes']}
for pid in before_colors:
    if pid in after_colors:
        if pid in after_colors:
            if before_colors[pid] != after_colors[pid]:
                if before_colors[pid] != after_colors[pid]:
                print("Color changed:", pid, before_colors[pid], "->", after_colors[pid])
</parameter>
